'''Anthony England''' (born 19 October 1986) is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who last played as a {{rlp|pr}} for the [[Bradford Bulls]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]].

He has previously played for the [[Castleford Tigers]] in [[2005 Rugby League National Leagues|National League One]], and [[Newcastle Thunder|Gateshead Thunder]] in [[RFL League 1|National League Two]] and the [[2009 RFL Championship|Co-operative Championship]]. England also played for the [[Dewsbury Rams]] and [[Featherstone Rovers]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]], and the [[Warrington Wolves]] and [[Wakefield Trinity]] in the [[Super League]].<ref name="Profile at loverugbyleague.com"/><ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/><ref name="Castleford RLFC A to Z Player List (All Time)">{{cite web|url=http://www.thecastlefordtigers.co.uk/alltime.php|title=Castleford RLFC A to Z Player List (All Time)|publisher=thecastlefordtigers.co.uk c/o web.archive.org|date=31 December 2013|accessdate=1 January 2014|url-status=dead|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20120216084010/http://www.thecastlefordtigers.co.uk/alltime.php|archivedate=16 February 2012 }}</ref><ref name="Statistics at thecastlefordtigers.co.uk">{{cite web|url=http://www.thecastlefordtigers.co.uk/playerprofile.php?pid=168|title=Statistics at thecastlefordtigers.co.uk|publisher=thecastlefordtigers.co.uk c/o web.archive.org|date=31 December 2013|accessdate=1 January 2014|url-status=dead|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20120610184439/http://www.thecastlefordtigers.co.uk/playerprofile.php?pid=168|archivedate=10 June 2012 }}</ref>

==Background==
England was born in [[Dewsbury]], [[West Yorkshire]], England.{{citation needed|date=February 2020}}

==Retirement==
On 1 April 2021 he announced his retirement due to injury.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=1 Apr 2021|accessdate=7 Apr 2021|title=Anthony England announces retirement|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/anthony-england-announces-retirement/}}</ref>
